finding_summary: [docs/templates.md:60-62] now says `final_review_arbiter` receives the same merged amendment list that `final_review_voter` sees, but the runtime contract built in [src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:2075-2117] passes only `disputed_amendments` plus `reviewer_votes` to the arbiter template.
affected_files: docs/templates.md, src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs
remediation_hint: Update the template docs to say the arbiter receives only disputed amendments plus `reviewer_votes`, not the full merged amendment list.
